sections.paragraph:
verb לעדות

to wear, be ornamented, to adorn oneself

verb להיוועד

be convened, to confer; be designated, assigned

verb להעיד

to testify, bear witness; indicate; attest to; warn

verb הועד

be designated, assigned; warned

masculine noun

witness

adverb

eternity

preposition

until, up to, as far as, till
